ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "country" TEXT /* User's country of origin */,
  "language" TEXT /* User's preferred language */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* User's timezone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the game */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode (e.g., single-player, multi-player) */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Game genre (e.g., action, strategy, puzzle) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Name of the game developer */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the game publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who played the session */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game played */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "game_session_status" TEXT /* Status of the game session (e.g., active, completed, abandoned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game state */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the game state belongs to */,
  "game_state" TEXT /* JSON object representing the game state */,
  "move_number" INTEGER /* Move number in the session */,
  "game_state_type" TEXT /* Type of game state (e.g., start, end, checkpoint) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_states_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moves" (
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the move belongs to */,
  "move_number" INTEGER /* Move number in the session */,
  "move_type" TEXT /* Type of move (e.g., piece movement, capture) */,
  "move_data" TEXT /* JSON object representing the move data */,
  "move_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the move */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_metadata" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., board size, game mode) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., integer, string, boolean) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "metadata_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_metadata" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., favorite game, skill level) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., integer, string, boolean) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "metadata_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_performance" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the performance metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., completion rate, average playtime) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric (e.g., percentage, seconds) */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the performance metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "metric_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_performance" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user the performance metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., win rate, average game duration) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric (e.g., percentage, seconds) */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the performance metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "metric_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the leaderboard belongs to */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user in the leaderboard */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user in the leaderboard */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the user in the leaderboard */,
  "leaderboard_date" TEXT /* Date the leaderboard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who unlocked the achievement */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "achievement_date" TEXT /* Date the achievement was unlocked */,
  "achievement_type" TEXT /* Type of achievement (e.g., level completion, score achievement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who left the comment */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the comment is about */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was left */,
  "comment_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the comment (e.g., helpful, not helpful) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_comments_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who left the rating */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was left */,
  "rating_review" TEXT /* Review text accompanying the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_ratings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_friends" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who has a friend */,
  "friend_id" TEXT /* ID of the friend */,
  "friendship_status" TEXT /* Status of the friendship (e.g., pending, accepted, blocked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "friend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the reward belongs to */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., in-game currency, bonus level) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_rewards_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
